en: Tsunami warning: Severe earthquake in the Philippines. The earth shakes again on the Pacific Ring of Fire. The authorities in the Philippines and Indonesia are warning of a tsunami - and are calling on people to seek safety.
la: Tsunami admonitio: Gravis terrae motus in Philippinis. Terra Pacifico Ignis Annulo iterum quatitur. Auctoritates in Philippinis et Indonesia admonent de tsunami - et vocant homines ad salutem quaerendam.
